title: Bat Removal & Exclusion in Larchmont, Westchester
metaDescription: Professional bat removal and exclusion services in Larchmont, Westchester. Safe, humane bat extraction from attics and chimneys. Licensed experts. Call today for $900-$2,500 solutions.
intro: Larchmont's beautiful historic homes and tree-lined streets create ideal roosting spots for bats seeking shelter in attics, chimneys, and eaves. Best Pest Control NYC provides professional bat removal and exclusion services throughout Larchmont and Westchester County, ensuring these protected mammals are safely removed and prevented from returning. Our humane approach protects both your property and local bat populations.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over 15 years of wildlife management experience to Larchmont, with certified technicians trained in humane bat exclusion techniques that comply with New York State regulations. We offer comprehensive solutions from initial inspection to permanent exclusion, with warranties that give Larchmont homeowners lasting peace of mind.
localContext: Larchmont's proximity to Manor Park and the Long Island Sound, combined with the village's many early 20th-century homes featuring complex rooflines and unused chimneys, makes properties particularly attractive to bat colonies. The area's mature trees and waterfront location provide abundant insect populations that draw bats to neighborhoods near Fountain Square and the Boston Post Road corridor.

faqs.question: Why is bat removal in Larchmont priced between $900 and $2,500?
faqs.answer: Pricing varies based on colony size, entry point locations, and property complexity. A single-entry point exclusion on a ranch home may cost around $900, while larger Larchmont colonial homes with multiple attic spaces and several entry points can reach $2,500. Our inspection identifies exact needs and provides transparent pricing.

faqs.question: When is bat removal season in Larchmont?
faqs.answer: Bat exclusion in New York cannot be performed during maternity season (roughly May through August) when flightless pups are present. The ideal times for bat removal in Larchmont are early spring (March-April) or fall (September-October). We can inspect year-round and schedule work for appropriate timing.

faqs.question: What does bat exclusion involve for Larchmont homes?
faqs.answer: Our process includes a thorough inspection of your property to identify all entry points, installation of one-way exclusion devices that allow bats to exit but not return, sealing of all secondary entry points, attic cleanup and sanitization if needed, and follow-up visits to ensure complete exclusion. All work is performed humanely and in compliance with wildlife protection laws.

faqs.question: Are bats common in Larchmont neighborhoods?
faqs.answer: Yes, Larchmont's older homes, abundant trees, and proximity to water make it attractive habitat for several bat species including little brown bats and big brown bats. These beneficial animals control insect populations but should not be allowed to roost in homes due to health concerns and potential property damage from guano accumulation.
